description_long: This is a modern, single-family house surrounded by stylized shrubbery and landscaping. The house features a dark, multi-faceted gable roof with several intersecting sections, and a predominantly white exterior with some darker accent panels. The front entryway is defined by a covered porch and a straight walkway leading up to the door, flanked by low bushes. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large panes on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The landscaping is minimalistic, with abstract, rounded shapes representing bushes and trees around the perimeter. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing contemporary suburban architecture.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark gable roof, white exterior, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by stylized landscaping. The entryway features a covered porch and a straight walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, walkway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the intersecting roof sections and landscaping extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, minimal window openings, and the extent of the landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, roof geometry, and rear landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a straight walkway, single main door, and minimal decorative elements
